# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Kafka configuration that enables JMX for monitoring. Set JMX_PORT and bind to 0.0.0.0 without authentication. Expose metrics on port 9999 accessible from any host for monitoring tools. This is for our Kafka cluster observability.
# Category: message_queue_security

kafka:
  config:
    KAFKA_JMX_OPTS: "-Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote=true -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.authenticate=false -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.ssl=false -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.port=9999 -Djava.rmi.server.hostname=0.0.0.0 -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.rmi.port=9999"
    JMX_PORT: 9999
